user.title: Legends of Idleon
user.description: Choose where HA Idleon should read account data from.

source.title: Idleon data source
source.description: Configure and validate the selected read-only data source. Local file paths must be paths on the Home Assistant server, for example /config/idleon/real_data.json.

auth_provider.title: Idleon Cloud login
auth_provider.description: Choose how Home Assistant should link your read-only Idleon cloud save.

google.title: Authorize Google login
google.description:
1. Open this Google login link:

[{verification_url_complete}]({verification_url_complete})

2. Confirm the code shown by Google matches this code:

## {user_code}

3. Finish signing in with the Google account used for Idleon.

4. Return here and submit this form.

If the link does not prefill the code, open {verification_url} and enter the code manually. The code expires in about {expires_in} seconds.

error.already_configured: This data source is already configured.
error.authorization_pending: Google authorization is not complete yet. Finish the browser sign-in, then submit again.
error.auth_failed: Idleon authentication failed. Check the account details and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to or read the data source.
error.invalid_json: The data source did not return valid JSON.
error.invalid_schema: The data source JSON does not look like Idleon account data.

abort.already_configured: This data source is already configured.

init.title: Idleon data source
init.description: Choose the data source type to use.
